name: Runway ML
tagline: AI-powered video generation and editing
description: Professional-grade AI video tools including Gen-3 Alpha for video generation, motion brush, and advanced editing capabilities. Used by major studios and independent creators alike.
pricingDetails: Free tier with limited credits. Standard plan starts at $12/mo.

name: Midjourney
tagline: Create stunning AI-generated images from text prompts
description: Industry-leading AI image generation with exceptional artistic quality. Create illustrations, concept art, photorealistic images, and more from text descriptions.
pricingDetails: Basic plan starts at $10/mo. Standard at $30/mo.

name: ElevenLabs
tagline: AI voice generation and cloning platform
description: Create natural-sounding voiceovers, clone voices, and generate speech in multiple languages. Perfect for podcasters, video creators, and audiobook producers.
pricingDetails: Free tier with 10k characters/mo. Starter at $5/mo.

name: Jasper AI
tagline: AI writing assistant for marketing and content
description: Enterprise-grade AI writing platform for creating blog posts, social media content, ad copy, and marketing materials at scale.
pricingDetails: Creator plan starts at $49/mo. Pro at $69/mo.

name: Framer
tagline: AI-powered website builder for designers
description: Design and publish stunning websites with AI-assisted layout generation, copy writing, and responsive design. No coding required.
pricingDetails: Free tier available. Mini at $5/mo. Basic at $15/mo.

name: Pika
tagline: Turn ideas into videos with AI
description: AI video generation platform that creates and edits videos from text, images, or existing clips. Features include lip sync, sound effects, and scene expansion.
pricingDetails: Free tier with 250 credits. Standard at $8/mo.

name: CapCut
tagline: Free all-in-one video editor with AI features
description: Feature-rich video editor with AI-powered tools like auto-captions, background removal, text-to-speech, and smart editing. Perfect for social media content.
pricingDetails: Free with optional Pro plan at $7.99/mo for premium features.

name: Canva AI
tagline: AI-powered design platform for everyone
description: All-in-one design platform with Magic Studio AI tools including text-to-image, background remover, Magic Eraser, and AI-powered design suggestions.
pricingDetails: Free tier available. Pro at $12.99/mo with full AI features.

name: DALL-E
tagline: OpenAI's image generation model
description: Create realistic images and art from text descriptions. Integrated into ChatGPT Plus, offering inpainting, outpainting, and variations of existing images.
pricingDetails: Available through ChatGPT Plus at $20/mo or API credits.

name: Adobe Firefly
tagline: AI image generation built for creative professionals
description: Adobe's generative AI tools designed for commercial use. Create images, text effects, and vector graphics with AI. Integrated across Adobe Creative Cloud apps.
pricingDetails: Free tier with 25 credits/mo. Premium at $4.99/mo.

name: Descript
tagline: AI-powered audio and video editing by editing text
description: Edit audio and video as easily as editing a document. Features include AI transcription, filler word removal, studio sound, eye contact correction, and AI voice cloning.
pricingDetails: Free tier with 1 hour of transcription. Hobbyist at $24/mo.

name: Suno
tagline: Create music with AI from text prompts
description: Generate full songs including vocals, instruments, and lyrics from simple text descriptions. Great for content creators needing custom background music or jingles.
pricingDetails: Free tier with 50 credits/day. Pro at $8/mo.

name: Copy.ai
tagline: AI-powered copywriting and workflow automation
description: Generate marketing copy, blog posts, product descriptions, and social media content. Features workflow automation for scaling content production across teams.
pricingDetails: Free tier with 2,000 words/mo. Pro at $49/mo.

name: Grammarly
tagline: AI writing assistant for clear, effective communication
description: Beyond grammar checking — Grammarly's AI helps with tone detection, rewriting, brainstorming, and generating text. Essential for any content creator who writes.
pricingDetails: Free basic plan. Premium at $12/mo. Business at $15/mo per user.

name: Figma AI
tagline: AI-powered design tools inside Figma
description: Figma's built-in AI features including auto-layout suggestions, visual search, AI-generated prototypes, and smart component recommendations for faster design workflows.
pricingDetails: Free for individuals. Professional at $15/mo per editor.

name: Looka
tagline: AI-powered logo and brand identity designer
description: Create professional logos and complete brand kits with AI. Generate hundreds of logo concepts, then customize colors, fonts, and layouts to build a cohesive brand identity.
pricingDetails: Free to design. Basic logo package at $20 one-time.

name: Buffer
tagline: AI-powered social media management and scheduling
description: Plan, schedule, and publish social media content with AI-assisted caption writing, hashtag suggestions, and optimal posting time recommendations.
pricingDetails: Free for up to 3 channels. Essentials at $6/mo per channel.

name: Lately
tagline: AI that repurposes long content into social posts
description: Transform blog posts, podcasts, and videos into dozens of social media posts with AI. Learns your brand voice and optimizes content for each platform.
pricingDetails: Starter at $49/mo. Pro at $119/mo.

name: Surfer SEO
tagline: AI-driven SEO content optimization
description: Optimize content for search engines with AI-powered content scoring, keyword research, SERP analysis, and real-time writing guidelines. Integrates with popular writing tools.
pricingDetails: Essential at $89/mo. Scale at $129/mo.

name: Semrush
tagline: All-in-one SEO and marketing toolkit with AI
description: Comprehensive digital marketing platform with AI-powered keyword research, competitor analysis, content marketing tools, and rank tracking. The industry standard for SEO.
pricingDetails: Pro at $139.95/mo. Guru at $249.95/mo.

name: Opus Clip
tagline: AI-powered short clip generator from long videos
description: Automatically extract the most engaging moments from long-form videos and repurpose them as viral short clips for TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and Instagram Reels.
pricingDetails: Free tier with watermark. Starter at $9/mo.

name: Leonardo AI
tagline: AI image generation with fine-tuned creative control
description: Generate production-quality images with granular control over style, composition, and detail. Features include real-time canvas, model training, and texture generation for game assets.
pricingDetails: Free tier with 150 tokens/day. Apprentice at $12/mo.

name: ChatGPT
tagline: AI assistant for writing, brainstorming, and content creation
description: OpenAI's versatile AI assistant for generating ideas, writing drafts, summarizing content, coding, and creative brainstorming. The Swiss Army knife of AI tools for creators.
pricingDetails: Free tier available. Plus at $20/mo with GPT-4 access.

name: TubeGen AI
tagline: AI-powered YouTube automation and script generation
description: YouTube content automation platform that generates video scripts, titles, voiceovers, and visuals using AI. Features keyword research, content idea generation, and the ability to replicate successful channel styles with one click.
pricingDetails: Plans start at $29/mo. Higher tiers up to $99/mo with more credits.

name: Higgsfield AI
tagline: Unified AI studio for cinematic video and image creation
description: All-in-one AI platform for video and image generation with cinematic quality. Features 70+ camera presets like Bullet Time and Crash Zoom, consistent character creation with Soul ID, lipsync studio, and multi-shot storyboarding — all in one workspace.
pricingDetails: Free plan with limited credits. Basic at $5.99/mo. Pro at $16.99/mo. Ultimate at $29.99/mo.

name: Luma Dream Machine
tagline: Generate cinematic AI videos from text and images
description: AI video generation platform designed for highly cinematic, visually stunning results. Create videos from text prompts or images with smooth motion and professional quality. Ideal for social media content and creative projects.
pricingDetails: Free tier available. Lite at $9.99/mo. Standard at $29.99/mo. Pro at $99.99/mo.

name: HeyGen
tagline: AI video avatars for marketing and training content
description: Create professional videos with realistic AI avatars that deliver scripted content. Supports multilingual video creation, lip sync, and team collaboration. Used for marketing videos, product demos, training, and personalized outreach at scale.
pricingDetails: Creator at $29/mo (unlimited avatar videos). Business at $149/mo + $20/seat.

name: Ideogram
tagline: AI image generation with best-in-class text rendering
description: The industry leader in generating images with accurate, readable text — posters, signs, logos, and typography that other AI tools struggle with. Essential for designers working on text-heavy visual content like social media graphics and marketing materials.
pricingDetails: Free tier available. Plus at $8/mo. Pro at $20/mo.

name: Krea AI
tagline: Real-time AI image and video generation platform
description: Creative AI platform with real-time image generation, video restyling, motion control, and lip-sync animation. Integrates multiple AI models like Kling and Minimax into a single dashboard for versatile creative production.
pricingDetails: Free tier available. Pro at $30/mo with expanded generation limits.

name: Kling AI
tagline: Hyper-realistic AI video generation with smooth motion
description: Known for generating highly realistic, smooth-motion AI videos with professional cinematic quality. Ideal for short cinematic content, product demos, and expressive storytelling with natural-looking movement and detail.
pricingDetails: Free tier with limited generations. Pro plans from $9.99/mo.

name: Synthesia
tagline: AI video platform with lifelike digital avatars
description: Create professional training, marketing, and educational videos using AI avatars that speak in 130+ languages. No cameras, actors, or studios needed. Widely used by enterprises for scalable video content production.
pricingDetails: Starter at $22/mo. Creator at $67/mo. Enterprise pricing on request.

name: Pictory
tagline: Turn articles and scripts into videos automatically
description: AI-powered tool that converts blog posts, articles, and scripts into engaging videos automatically. Analyzes text, selects relevant stock footage, adds music, and generates polished edits. Perfect for repurposing written content into video format.
pricingDetails: Free trial available. Starter at $19/mo. Professional at $39/mo.

name: Murf AI
tagline: Professional AI voiceover studio for teams
description: All-in-one AI voice studio with 120+ voices across 20+ languages. Word-level customization of pitch, speed, and emphasis. Built for marketers, e-learning professionals, and content teams needing natural-sounding voiceovers at scale.
pricingDetails: Free trial available. Creator at $26/mo. Business at $66/mo.

name: Notion AI
tagline: AI-powered workspace for writing, planning, and organizing
description: AI built into Notion's workspace for writing assistance, summarization, brainstorming, and task automation. Features autonomous AI agents that can automate workflows, smart writing tools, and knowledge base Q&A across your workspace.
pricingDetails: Free plan available. Plus at $10/mo. Business at $18/mo. AI included in higher tiers.

name: Perplexity
tagline: AI-powered research and answer engine for creators
description: Intelligent research companion combining search engine capabilities with conversational AI. Get sourced, accurate answers for content research, fact-checking, and trend discovery. Invaluable for creators who need reliable information quickly.
pricingDetails: Free basic plan. Pro at $20/mo with advanced models and unlimited searches.

name: Claude
tagline: Advanced AI assistant for thoughtful writing and analysis
description: Anthropic's AI assistant excels at long-form writing, nuanced editing, detailed analysis, and creative brainstorming. Known for careful, thoughtful responses and the ability to handle complex content creation tasks with a 200K token context window.
pricingDetails: Free tier available. Pro at $20/mo with extended usage.

name: InVideo AI
tagline: Generate publish-ready videos from text prompts
description: Create full videos from a single text prompt — InVideo AI handles script, footage selection, voiceover, music, and editing automatically. Edit any element by chatting with the AI. Perfect for creators who need quick, professional videos.
pricingDetails: Free tier with watermark. Plus at $25/mo. Max at $60/mo.

name: Remove.bg
tagline: Instant AI background removal for images
description: Remove image backgrounds instantly with AI. Handles complex edges like hair and transparent objects with precision. Integrates via API, Photoshop plugin, and bulk processing. Essential utility for designers, e-commerce, and social media creators.
pricingDetails: Free for preview quality. Subscription from $9/mo for HD downloads.

name: PhotoRoom
tagline: AI photo editor for product and marketing images
description: Create professional product photos and marketing visuals with AI-powered background removal, scene generation, and batch editing. Used by e-commerce sellers, marketers, and social media creators to produce studio-quality images from phone photos.
pricingDetails: Free tier available. Pro at $12.99/mo with full features.
